description: Join the digital transformation team at OCP. Build internal dashboards used by thousands of engineers across mining sites in Morocco.
longDescription: As a Frontend Developer Intern at OCP Digital, you'll join a 12-person product squad rebuilding the internal operations cockpit used daily by mining engineers in Khouribga, Benguerir and Youssoufia. You'll ship real features to production from week 2, pair with senior engineers, and own at least one end-to-end module by the end of your internship. This program is part of OCP's Génération Talents initiative and has converted 78% of past interns into full-time hires.
responsibilities: Build production React components for the operations cockpit (dashboards, charts, forms)
Implement designs from Figma with Tailwind CSS, ensuring accessibility and responsive behavior
Integrate REST and GraphQL APIs with TanStack Query and write meaningful unit tests
Participate in code reviews, sprint planning and retros with the squad
Present a final project to the Digital leadership team at the end of the internship
requirements: 3rd year or Master's student in Computer Science or related field
Solid JavaScript fundamentals and at least one React project (school or personal)
Comfortable with Git and collaborative workflows
French or English (B2+) — Arabic is a plus
niceToHave: Familiarity with Tailwind or any utility-first CSS framework
perks: Hybrid: 3 days office (Casa Anfa) / 2 days remote
Free access to internal training catalog
teamSize: Squad of 12 (4 engineers, 2 designers, 1 PM, QA, data)
aboutCompany: OCP Group is the world's largest exporter of phosphate. OCP Digital is its in-house tech arm in Casablanca, building the software that powers mining, logistics and industrial operations across Morocco.

applicationProcess.desc: Submit your CV and a short motivation note (5 min)
Meet your future tech lead and a peer

description: Analyze customer behavior across mobile and broadband segments.
longDescription: Join Inwi's Customer Insights team in Rabat to dig into the behavior of millions of mobile and fiber subscribers. You'll build dashboards used by marketing and product leadership and contribute to the churn-prediction model.
responsibilities: Write SQL queries against the customer data warehouse (BigQuery)
Build and maintain Power BI dashboards for marketing and product teams
Support the data science team on a churn-prediction modeling project
Document findings and present weekly insights to stakeholders
requirements: Master's student in Statistics, Data Science, Engineering or equivalent
Strong SQL skills (joins, window functions)
Working knowledge of Python (pandas, numpy)
French (C1) — English is a plus
perks: On-site at Inwi HQ, Rabat (Hay Riad)
teamSize: Customer Insights team (6 analysts, 2 data scientists)
aboutCompany: Inwi is one of Morocco's three telecom operators, serving millions of mobile and fiber customers. Headquartered in Rabat.

Synthesize research into journey maps and opportunity areas

Collaborate with engineers on handoff and QA

French (C1)
aboutCompany: CIH Bank is one of Morocco's leading banks, with a strong focus on digital innovation through its Digital Studio in Casablanca.

requirements: Bachelor's or Master's in Marketing, Communications or Business

Integrate backend REST APIs and handle offline scenarios
Write widget and integration tests
Participate in bi-weekly releases to the Play Store and App Store
